title: Electrical and Electronics Repairers, Commercial and Industrial Equipment
description: Repair, test, adjust, or install electronic equipment, such as industrial controls, transmitters, and antennas.

tasks.text: Test faulty equipment to diagnose malfunctions, using test equipment or software, and applying knowledge of the functional operation of electronic units and systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment logs that record performance problems, repairs, calibrations, or tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and test industrial equipment to ensure that it functions properly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect components of industrial equipment for accurate assembly and installation or for defects, such as loose connections or frayed wires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Install repaired equipment in various settings, such as industrial or military establishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate equipment to demonstrate proper use or to analyze malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Enter information into computer to copy program or to draw, modify, or store schematics, applying knowledge of software package used.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform scheduled preventive maintenance tasks, such as checking, cleaning, or repairing equipment, to detect and prevent problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calibrate testing instruments and installed or repaired equipment to prescribed specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or adjust equipment, machines, or defective components, replacing worn parts, such as gaskets or seals in watertight electrical equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with customers, supervisors, or engineers to plan layout of equipment or to resolve problems in system operation or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain inventory of spare parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study blueprints, schematics, manuals, or other specifications to determine installation procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine work orders and converse with equipment operators to detect equipment problems and to ascertain whether mechanical or human errors contributed to the problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate efforts with other workers involved in installing or maintaining equipment or components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or modify industrial electronic devices, circuits, or equipment, according to available specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine feasibility of using standardized equipment or develop specifications for equipment required to perform additional functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise management regarding customer satisfaction, product performance, or suggestions for product improvements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Send defective units to the manufacturer or to a specialized repair shop for repair.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sign overhaul documents for equipment replaced or repaired.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
